_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Operate the Data Governance Council, including scheduling, agenda preparation, issue tracking, decision logging, and follow-through on action items.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-003 (AB, cosine: 0.374), RC-T-006 (RC, cosine: 0.373).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.9/10 (raw 0.386). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [analysis, perform, timeline] vs WIDAI-only terms [action, agenda, council, data, decision, follow] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.873, R=0.830). P exceeds R by 0.043 — the DCWF element's 3 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.8%). "Perform timeline analysis." and "Operate the Data Governance Council, including scheduling, agenda preparation, i" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.378 ≈ STS 0.386 (gap 0.007). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [analysis, perform, timeline]. WIDAI terms: [action, agenda, council, data, decision, follow].
